threats.title: Apple Sends Lock Screen Alerts to Outdated iPhones Over Active Web-Based Exploits
threats.summary: Apple is now sending Lock Screen notifications to iPhones and iPads running older versions of iOS and iPadOS to alert users of web-based attacks and urge them to install the update. The development was first reported by MacRumors. "Apple is aware of attacks targeting out-of-date iOS software, including the version on your iPhone. threats.title: TeamPCP Pushes Malicious Telnyx Versions to PyPI, Hides Stealer in WAV Files
threats.summary: TeamPCP, the threat actor behind the supply chain attack targeting Trivy, KICS, and litellm, has now compromised the telnyx Python package by pushing two malicious versions to steal sensitive data. threats.title: Open VSX Bug Let Malicious VS Code Extensions Bypass Pre-Publish Security Checks
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a now-patched bug impacting Open VSX's pre-publish scanning pipeline to cause the tool to allow a malicious Microsoft Visual Studio Code (VS Code) extension to pass the vetting process and go live in the registry.
